top_categories.workout_context: At mile 60 of 87, glycogen is gone. This workout teaches your body to produce watts on fumes.
94ft/mi means long efforts at or near FTP on every climb. If your threshold cracks at minute 15, you'll walk the rest.
Granfondo Laigueglia's mixed terrain forces constant power changes. Surge over the rough stuff, settle on the smooth, repeat for 87 miles.
Race-pace efforts that mimic Granfondo Laigueglia's demands. Pacing, fueling, and tactical decisions under fatigue. Practice the race before February.
At Granfondo Laigueglia, surges push you above threshold and you have to recover while still riding. Over-unders train exactly that.
88–92% FTP is where you'll spend the hardest sustained miles of Granfondo Laigueglia. Train it until it feels boring.
8,202ft of climbing on grades that change every minute. You need to switch from seated to standing without losing rhythm.
8,202ft of climbing means repeated surges above threshold. VO2max work is how you survive the fifth climb, not just the first.
How long can you hold 105% FTP before you blow? At Granfondo Laigueglia, that number decides whether you bridge or get dropped.
Every hard session works better with a bigger aerobic base. At 87 miles, base fitness is the difference between racing and surviving.
Short, max efforts are unavoidable. Punchy climbs, gap closures, attacks on mixed terrain. If you haven't trained them, you'll crack.
The aerobic base that lets you ride mixed terrain at tempo for 87 miles without cracking. No shortcuts.

race_overlay.heat: February in Laigueglia, Liguria, Italy can bring heat. Complete 3–4 heat exposure sessions in the final 2 weeks before Granfondo Laigueglia. Increase sodium intake 48 hours before race day.
race_overlay.nutrition: Target 60–80g carbs/hour for Granfondo Laigueglia’s 87 miles. Start fueling within the first 30 minutes — early fueling prevents late-race collapse. Bonking at mile 60 is a nutrition failure, not a fitness failure.
race_overlay.terrain: Mixed terrain at Granfondo Laigueglia requires surface adaptability. Include weekly rides on mixed terrain to build confidence.

pack_summary: This 10-workout pack focuses on Durability, TT Threshold, and Gravel Specific to prepare you for 87 miles of mixed terrain in Laigueglia, Liguria, Italy.
